lines: Stay still, let me bandage you up.

lines: Where is James??
Bitten... My god...
Oh well.. there is nothing we can do.
Thanks for letting me know about James.
Come back later as I may ahve a task for you.
This area is starting to grow unsafe.
If you can kill at least 10 stumblers...
Maybe we could have one night of undistributed sleep.
Where is James??
Bitten... My god...
Oh well.. there is nothing we can do.
Thanks for letting me know about James.

lines: Ughh, this bite hurts so bad..
You'll have to go on without me.
My friend Rick went up ahead.
Maybe y'all can team up, it's deadly out here.
You came back?!
I'm not sure how much longer I'll last.
I could really use something to help with my pain.
ahh, that's the stuff..
thank.. you.. my... friend
